mapper.select: SELECT camera_id AS "cameraId", project_id AS "projectId", camera_name AS "cameraName", camera_url AS "cameraUrl", enabled, sort_order AS "sortOrder", created_at AS "createdAt" FROM monitoring_camera WHERE project_id = #{projectId} ORDER BY sort_order ASC, created_at ASC

SELECT camera_id AS "cameraId", project_id AS "projectId", camera_name AS "cameraName", camera_url AS "cameraUrl", enabled, sort_order AS "sortOrder" FROM monitoring_camera WHERE project_id = #{projectId} AND enabled = TRUE ORDER BY sort_order ASC, created_at ASC

SELECT camera_id AS "cameraId", project_id AS "projectId", camera_name AS "cameraName", camera_url AS "cameraUrl", enabled, sort_order AS "sortOrder", created_at AS "createdAt" FROM monitoring_camera WHERE camera_id = #{cameraId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO monitoring_camera (camera_id, project_id, camera_name, camera_url, enabled, sort_order) VALUES (#{cameraId}, #{projectId}, #{cameraName}, #{cameraUrl}, #{enabled}, #{sortOrder})
mapper.select: SELECT schedule_id AS "scheduleId", project_id AS "projectId", enabled, capture_interval_sec AS "captureIntervalSec", retention_sec AS "retentionSec", last_captured_at AS "lastCapturedAt" FROM monitoring_schedule WHERE enabled = TRUE

SELECT schedule_id AS "scheduleId", project_id AS "projectId", enabled, capture_interval_sec AS "captureIntervalSec", retention_sec AS "retentionSec", last_captured_at AS "lastCapturedAt", created_at AS "createdAt" FROM monitoring_schedule WHERE project_id = #{projectId} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO monitoring_schedule (schedule_id, project_id, enabled, capture_interval_sec, retention_sec, updated_at) VALUES (#{scheduleId}, #{projectId}, #{enabled}, #{captureIntervalSec}, #{retentionSec}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) ON CONFLICT (schedule_id) DO UPDATE SET enabled = EXCLUDED.enabled, capture_interval_sec = EXCLUDED.capture_interval_sec, retention_sec = EXCLUDED.retention_sec, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
mapper.update: UPDATE monitoring_schedule SET last_captured_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE schedule_id = #{scheduleId}
mapper.select: SELECT snapshot_id AS "snapshotId", project_id AS "projectId", schedule_id AS "scheduleId", camera_id AS "cameraId", camera_name AS "cameraName", mode, is_problem AS "isProblem", detection_json AS "detectionJson", captured_at AS "capturedAt", expires_at AS "expiresAt" FROM monitoring_snapshot WHERE project_id = #{projectId} ORDER BY captured_at DESC

SELECT snapshot_id AS "snapshotId", project_id AS "projectId", schedule_id AS "scheduleId", camera_id AS "cameraId", camera_name AS "cameraName", mode, is_problem AS "isProblem", detection_json AS "detectionJson", captured_at AS "capturedAt", expires_at AS "expiresAt" FROM monitoring_snapshot WHERE snapshot_id = #{snapshotId}
SELECT image_data FROM monitoring_snapshot WHERE snapshot_id = #{snapshotId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO monitoring_snapshot (snapshot_id, project_id, schedule_id, camera_id, camera_name, mode, image_data, is_problem, detection_json, captured_at, expires_at) VALUES (#{snapshotId}, #{projectId}, #{scheduleId}, #{cameraId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{cameraName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{mode}, #{imageData}, #{isProblem}, #{detectionJson,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, #{expiresAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM monitoring_snapshot WHERE project_id = #{projectId} AND is_problem = TRUE
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM monitoring_snapshot WHERE snapshot_id = ( SELECT snapshot_id FROM monitoring_snapshot WHERE project_id = #{projectId} AND is_problem = TRUE ORDER BY captured_at ASC LIMIT 1 )
DELETE FROM monitoring_snapshot WHERE expires_at IS NOT NULL AND expires_at < CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
